content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after session 84 (iter-084)

## Headline
**Real progress: sorry 3 ‚Üí 2.** L1 `dual_restrict_iso_comp` STEP-B CLOSED ‚Üí S3
`dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` fully sorry-free + axiom-clean. The ~15-iter `restrictFunctor j`
diamond cone is retired on the dual-restriction leg. Two sorries remain, both in
`TensorObjInverse.lean`: S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L1567) and telescope
`trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2335).

## Next frontier ‚Äî S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L1567)
- It is a **NEW separable construction**, NOT a reuse of L1. The `dual_scp_assemble`/SCP-cocycle
  device does NOT transfer (different shape: `dual_unit_iso = sheafify(presheafDualUnitIso) ‚â™‚â´ counit`,
  no SCP-composition cocycle).
- **DO NOT assign a monolithic prover round.** Per the stuck-protocol pattern that paid off on S3
  (iter-083 effort-break ‚Üí iter-084 close), **effort-break S4a FIRST** into the named sub-lemma:
  build `presheafDualPullbackComparison_unit` (the Œ∏-at-unit identification) relating
  `presheafDualPullbackComparison j (SheafOfModules.unit U.ringCatSheaf)` to `presheafDualUnitIso`
  modulo `unitRestrictIso j`, via the pullback/pushforward behaviour of the monoidal unit `ùüô_` and the
  dual-unit eval-at-1. Then thread it through the exposed S4a residual exactly as S3 threads bridges
  (b)/(c). Anchor: `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` (DualInverse.lean:317, sorry-free) is the
  unit-automorphism core but must be promoted to the immersion `j`. Scope ‚âà STEP-B (~100+ LOC).
- HARD GATE check before any prover on S4a: the Œ∏-at-unit sub-lemma must be blueprinted (it does not
  exist yet) ‚Äî dispatch effort-breaker on `lem:dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (or a blueprint-writer
  for the new Œ∏-unit block) before prover work.

## Telescope `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2335) ‚Äî DO NOT assign yet
Gated on all five squares (S2/S3/S4b done, S4a OPEN, S4c) + chart-chase telescope assembly. Strictly
downstream of S4a. Re-assess only after S4a closes.

## Blueprint coverage debt (1-to-1) ‚Äî planner to restore (do NOT re-assign provers on these)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 129 lean_aux nodes total. This iter's relevant new/standing debt:
- **`dual_scp_assemble`** (TensorObjInverse.lean ~L1298) ‚Äî NEW `private` generic single-`[Category C]`
  abstract SCP-cocycle assembly helper (head-cancel + mid-cancel + naturality ‚Üí 2-step RHS); pure
  category algebra (`Category.assoc`, `Category.id_comp`, `reassoc_of%`). Sibling of the existing
  generic plumbing helpers. Either blueprint a thin block or leave `private` un-blueprinted as the
  other generic helpers are ‚Äî planner's call.
- **`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general`** + **`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general_hom`**
  (B2, iter-083) ‚Äî un-blueprinted; L1's `\uses`/prose still cite the chart variant
  `lem:restrictfunctorisopullback_comp_compat`. Add a blueprint block for the general pair and repoint
  L1's `\uses` + prose B2 reference (lvb major, carried from iter-083; non-blocking).

## Lean hygiene (prover/refactor ‚Äî review cannot edit `.lean`)
- **Stale comment** `TensorObjInverse.lean:1169`: "see the `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` sorry
  below" ‚Äî S3 is now closed; the active sorries are S4a (L1567) and telescope (L2335). Fix on next
  prover/refactor touch of the file.
- **Dead private helpers** (0 call sites): `iso_symm_trans_cancel` (L1149, superseded by
  `iso_symm_fold_cancel`) and `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (L1101, superseded by the folded
  L1 route). Consider removing on next refactor ‚Äî not urgent.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered this iter
- **Folded Scheme-dual cocycle across the `SheafOfModules ‚â´` seam**: `apply Iso.ext` ‚Üí syntactic
  `.hom` flatten (`Iso.trans_hom`/`Functor.mapIso_hom`/`Functor.map_comp`/`Iso.symm_hom`/`Iso.app_hom`)
  ‚Üí `exact` a generic pure-`[Category C]` assembly lemma. Beats both the iso-level `rw`/`erw` route and
  the Scheme-typed monolithic assembly (whnf-bomb). Reuse for any remaining dual-flank cocycle.
- Mid-pair cancel under `sheafify`: term-mode `congrArg` (keyed `rw [Iso.hom_inv_id_app]` misses the
  presheaf-over-Z composite-functor seam).

## Convergence read
Converging. S4a is the last hard piece (then the telescope assembly). If the effort-break of S4a
yields a clean Œ∏-unit sub-lemma and the prover still cannot close it, that is the first true stall on
S4a ‚Üí break it further; do not re-grind. progress-critic not warranted next iter unless the planner
assigns a monolithic S4a prover without the effort-break.
